entries.name: Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts)
entries.definition: Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.
roles: Uses Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) principles for empowerment
contributions: Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
Wisdom governance balances authority with compassion
True power serves the highest good of all beings

attributes.governor_essence: A Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by kuji kiri principles.
relationship_approaches: Connects through Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) understanding
